titleStmt.title: SII 24.274: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 274. (A.R. No. 57 of 1892.) NORTH WALL OF THE SECOND PRĀKĀRA.

summary.p: Registers an endowment of garden-land after having purchased the same from the temple lands by Ponnambalamahādēviyār, sister of Vīra-Rāmanātha, born to Vīra-Sōmēśvara of Dēvalamahādēvi, a Chāḷukya princess, (vide. No. 260). From out of the produce, a service of civet ointment, ornaments and other offerings to Periyaperumāḷ on the day of Kārttigai, were to be conducted on behalf of Ekkaḍai Dēvar. The record is dated in the 12th regnal year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

p.hi: svastiśrī . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprathvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara dvāravatipuravarādhirvara yādavakulāmbaradyumaṇi sarvajñacūḍāmaṇi malarājarāja malaparōḷugaṇḍagaṇḍabhēruṇḍa kadanapracaṇḍa Asahāyaśūra Ēkāṅgavira

śanivāra siddhi giridurgamalla caladaṅkarāma vairībhakaṇṭhīrava makararājyanirmmūlana pāṇḍyakulasamuddharaṇa cōḷarājyapratiṣṭhācāryya niśśaṅkapratāpacakravartti hōśaḷa śrīvīrasōmēśvara sudhāsindhōścāḷukyakulakumudavikasana candrikāyām

dēvalamahādēvi vēḷāyām samudbhūtābhinavalakṣmīḥ nikhilakṣitipati makuṭa taṭamaṇi marīcinicaya nīrājita caraṇasarasīruhakanakadhārāvarṣa svīkāra parājita parivārasannāha śrīvīrarāmanāthadēvasahōdarī daradaḷi tanaḷina
daḷasadṛkṣa kaṭākṣavikṣēpakṣapita kṣīṇajanakāluṣya kalāpākara sarasiruhavisṛmarakanakamakaranda sandōhānanditavanditakōlambakagīyamānaguṇagaṇaira dvitiyānitarasa dṛśa[na ?*]yanarūpātiśayēna smaramapi
vismāpayantī Anuttarēṇa vitaraṇēna cintāmaṇimapi santāpayantī vistṛtēna vibhavēna yakṣādhipatimapyadhikṣipantī pariṇatēva paritōṣēṇa kalpitēva kalyāṇēna pūritēvapuṇyēna viracitēva vinayēna
śrīsōmanāthadēva caraṇasarasijasaparyyā paryyāptasāmrājya vibhavā dayaā dānadākṣiṇyatyāgasatyaśīlādyanēkaguṇaratna rōhaṇasthalīhimakumu dakundacandanēndusubhagakīrttikētakaparimaḷanīcaya
p.seg: viyār kārttikaimātattu tirukkārttikait tirunāḷil periyaperumāḷ puḻuku neykkāppuc cātti Aruḷavum Iṟṟaināḷil tiruvārā
kāraṅkaḷukkum Uṭalāka Ekkaṭaitevarperil tirukkuṟaip paṟṟil vilaikoṇṭu tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāka śrīvīrarā
kam paṇṇittanta teṉoḻuku perumpuliyūr cirāmanampi tāyār
māṉa tirunantavaṉattukku meṟkut teṉ ṉāṟṟu niroṭukālukku vaṭakku
ṉuḷḷiṭṭār tirunantavanattukku kiḻakku tirumuṭikkuṟaikku peru māḷ Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa tiruvitikku teṟku naṭuvupaṭṭa tirunantavaṉam kol pattum vaṭavoḻuku Iḷaiyatiruttāḻvarai
tip peruvilai koṇṭa tirunantavanattukku meṟku tirumuṭikkuṟaikku perumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa tiruvitikku vaṭakku
ṉ Aṇai nta koḷari vetan tamiḻ ceytāṉ
tirunantavanattukku kiḻakku vaṭavāṟṟu niroṭukāl Ūṟ naṭuvupaṭṭa tirunantavanam kol patiṉ muṉṟaraiyum Āka tirunantavanam kol Irupattu muṉṟaraiyilum Uḷḷa
p.hi: śubhamastu . haimañcantrañca pīṭhammaṇimakṛtarā kañcukāsandhapīṭhī hārōmāṇikka vētramsubhaga
p.note: A small portion at the end of the inscription is lost.

div.p: Digital edition of SII 24.274 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
